channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Unknown languages (Monthly)

item.title: 🟦 nexu-io/open-design (53180 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nexu-io

📝 Repository: nexu-io/open-design

📄 Descrizione: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems 🖼 Generate web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI.

⭐ Stelle: 53180

🍴 Forks: 6033

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: agent-skills ai-agents ai-design byok claude claude-code-for-design claude-design coding-agents design-systems design-tools desktop-app figma-alternative generative-ai hermes-agent local-first nextjs no-code prototyping ui-generator vibe-coding

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-28T04:25:20Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-27T06:15:00Z

item.title: 📝 nexu-io/html-anything (6424 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nexu-io

📝 Repository: nexu-io/html-anything

📄 Descrizione: ✨ The agentic HTML editor — your local AI agent writes the HTML, you ship it. 🚀 75 Skills × 9 Surfaces (magazine · deck · poster · XHS / tweet · prototype · data report · Hyperframes) 🛡️ Sandboxed preview · 📤 1-click to WeChat / X / Zhihu / HTML / PNG 🔑 Zero API key — Claude Code / Cursor / Codex / Gemini / Copilot / OpenCode / Qwen / Aider.

🍴 Forks: 629

item.title: 🐹 alibaba/open-code-review (5551 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: alibaba

📝 Repository: alibaba/open-code-review

📄 Descrizione: Open-source & free — Battle-tested at Alibaba's scale. Hybrid architecture code review tool: deterministic pipelines + LLM Agent, precise line-level comments, built-in fine-tuned ruleset (NPE, thread-safety, XSS, SQL injection), OpenAI & Anthropic compatible.

⭐ Stelle: 5551

🍴 Forks: 273

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: agent code-review code-review-assistant harness repository-level-context

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-05-18T02:16:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-06-09T06:06:04Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐍 WUBING2023/PaperSpine (2592 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: WUBING2023

📝 Repository: WUBING2023/PaperSpine

📄 Descrizione: PaperSpine is a motivation-driven skill for learning from strong academic papers, building a paper’s central argument, and rewriting manuscripts through evidence-aware blueprints, revision matrices, and LaTeX-safe audits.

⭐ Stelle: 2592

🍴 Forks: 104
